description: Create a naval convoy escort scenario in Bridge Command located at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) Channel Convoy Escort/'. The scenario must use the 'English Channel East' environment set to 05:30 on Nov 15 2024 with moderate weather (Sea state <= 3.0, Visibility >= 8.0). Configure the ownship HMS Sentinel (Frigate) at 50.80N, 0.50E (positioned 3 nm from the convoy center on a True Bearing of 315) heading 045 at 10 knots. Include five other vessels in the scenario: a three-ship Merchant Column (Lead 1nm ahead of center, Guide at 50.80N, 0.50E, Rear 1nm astern) and a two-ship Escort Screen (HMS Guardian 3nm ahead of center, HMS Defender 3nm on the starboard beam). All vessels should head 045 at 10 knots and include a waypoint leg turning to 090 at Longitude 1.00E. Update the global configuration at '/home/ga/.config/Bridge Command/bc5.ini' (arpa_on=1, full_radar=1, max_radar_range=72, radar_range_resolution=256) and create a briefing document at '/home/ga/Documents/convoy_escort_brief.txt' detailing the formation, comms plan, and threat response.
